segments.narrative: En el corazón de España, late un pulso que resuena globalmente. No es solo un club; es una leyenda viviente.
segments.visual_prompt: Majestic aerial shot of a packed Santiago Bernabéu stadium at night, golden lights illuminating the stands, a sea of white jerseys, cinematic, photorealistic, 8k, slight lens flare.

segments.narrative: Su escudo, una corona real, simboliza grandeza, ambición y una historia sin igual.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra close-up, high-detail shot of the Real Madrid crest on a pristine white jersey, slightly worn texture, reflecting subtle stadium lights, deep focus, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Nacido en 1902, desde sus inicios, la pasión fue su motor imparable.
segments.visual_prompt: Sepia-toned historical photograph reenactment of a group of elegantly dressed gentlemen in early 20th-century Madrid, forming a football club, serious yet determined expressions, soft natural light, matte finish, historical documentary style.

segments.narrative: El blanco, más que un color, una identidad. Pureza, elegancia, dominación.
segments.visual_prompt: A single, perfectly folded, crisp white Real Madrid jersey resting on a dark wooden bench in an empty, sunlit locker room, dramatic spotlight on the jersey, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Pero una visión lo cambió todo: la de Santiago Bernabéu, el arquitecto de un imperio.
segments.visual_prompt: Vintage black and white portrait photo of a stern, visionary Santiago Bernabéu looking into the distance, slightly aged texture, strong key light from the side, historical documentary style, 1950s aesthetic.

segments.narrative: Su estadio, su fortaleza, cuna de sueños y batallas épicas.
segments.visual_prompt: Low-angle, wide shot of the old Santiago Bernabéu stadium in the 1950s, packed with fans, flags waving, dramatic shadows from the stands, black and white, slightly grainy, historical documentary style.

segments.narrative: Las Copas de Europa, su obsesión. Un trofeo forjado en la ambición.
segments.visual_prompt: A close-up of a gloved hand gently placing the first European Cup (trophy) onto a velvet display pedestal, golden light reflecting off the trophy, shallow depth of field, cinematic, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Nombres como Di Stéfano, Puskas, forjaron la leyenda inmortal.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic action shot of Alfredo Di Stéfano in a Real Madrid jersey, dribbling past an opponent with intensity and focus, classic 1950s football aesthetic, black and white, slight motion blur, historical documentary style.

segments.narrative: Luego llegaron los Galácticos. Una era de estrellas, glamour y marketing global que redefinió el deporte.
segments.visual_prompt: A cinematic shot of a young David Beckham in a Real Madrid kit, signing autographs for a massive, adoring crowd, flashes from cameras, vibrant colors, slightly overexposed, 2000s era, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Zidane, un genio en el campo, nos regaló momentos de pura magia.
segments.visual_prompt: High-angle, slow-motion shot capturing Zinedine Zidane's iconic volley in the 2002 Champions League final, ball mid-air, dramatic lighting, intense focus on his posture, blurred background of stadium, cinematic, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Cristiano Ronaldo, la máquina de goles, llevó al club a nuevas cimas.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic low-angle shot of Cristiano Ronaldo celebrating a goal at the Bernabéu, arms outstretched, roaring crowd blurred in the background, powerful and athletic, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: La Décima. El hito que marcó una nueva era de triunfos europeos inigualables.
segments.visual_prompt: A wide, emotional shot of Sergio Ramos lifting the Champions League trophy after La Décima win, confetti falling, team celebrating around him, dramatic stadium lights, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Inigualable en la Champions League, la competición es su hábitat natural, su patio de juegos.
segments.visual_prompt: Montage-style shot of three consecutive Champions League trophies displayed prominently, glistening under bright studio lights, reflecting a subtle, blurred image of a winning team, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Más que individuales, un equipo que nunca se rinde. Un espíritu forjado en el esfuerzo.
segments.visual_prompt: A close-up, gritty shot of a group of modern Real Madrid players, exhausted but resolute, huddling together mid-match, sweat on their brows, intense determination in their eyes, under floodlights, cinematic, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Su afición, un ejército de corazones blancos, la fuerza que impulsa cada victoria.
segments.visual_prompt: Immersive first-person perspective from the pitch looking up at a vast, passionate crowd of Real Madrid fans, chanting, waving flags, a sea of white, bathed in vibrant stadium lights, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: El nuevo Bernabéu, un coliseo futurista, símbolo de su eterna evolución.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra-modern, sleek architectural rendering of the renovated Santiago Bernabéu stadium at twilight, futuristic lighting, clean lines, reflecting the city lights, hyperrealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: El Real Madrid no juega al fútbol; reescribe la historia. Es el club más grande, y su leyenda, inmortal.
segments.visual_prompt: A panoramic shot of the Real Madrid museum's trophy room, countless trophies shimmering under elegant, soft illumination, focusing on the grand scale of achievements, photorealistic, 8k.
